_comment: GPU segment for OMP - add to 'segments' array in right-aligned block, before executiontime

segment.template: {{ if .Env.POSH_GPU0_UTIL }}󰢮0 <p:gpu_util>{{.Env.POSH_GPU0_UTIL}}%</> <p:gpu_mem>󰍛 {{.Env.POSH_GPU0_MEM_GB}}</> {{if gt (atoi .Env.POSH_GPU0_TEMP) 79}}<p:gpu_temp_hot>{{else if gt (atoi .Env.POSH_GPU0_TEMP) 59}}<p:gpu_temp_warm>{{else}}<p:gpu_temp_cool>{{end}}󰔏 {{.Env.POSH_GPU0_TEMP}}°</>{{ end }}{{ if .Env.POSH_GPU1_UTIL }}<p:white> · </>󰢮1 <p:gpu_util>{{.Env.POSH_GPU1_UTIL}}%</> <p:gpu_mem>󰍛 {{.Env.POSH_GPU1_MEM_GB}}</> {{if gt (atoi .Env.POSH_GPU1_TEMP) 79}}<p:gpu_temp_hot>{{else if gt (atoi .Env.POSH_GPU1_TEMP) 59}}<p:gpu_temp_warm>{{else}}<p:gpu_temp_cool>{{end}}󰔏 {{.Env.POSH_GPU1_TEMP}}°</>{{ end }}
